overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a green outfit with a wide-brimmed hat walking across a rain-slicked neon-lit street in Night City. The character crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk, passes a stationary yellow sports car, and continues along a futuristic sidewalk lined with holographic billboards and towering corporate buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban crosswalk with wet reflective asphalt

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car stopped at the crosswalk waiting for pedestrians to pass
pedestrian in red and white outfit walking ahead toward the sidewalk

entered.detail: bold yellow and black diagonal stripes painted on the rain-slicked asphalt
dark reflective road surface mirroring the neon signs and street lights
tall corporate building with large vertical neon sign displaying the number 10
large illuminated advertisement screen with BILAROS text on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide neon-lit intersection at night, stepping on bold yellow crosswalk stripes. A yellow sports car waits on the left while futuristic corporate towers rise ahead, their glass facades covered in glowing digital advertisements and vertical signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with street furniture and building entrances

events.description: steps off the asphalt crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk curb

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a street lamp and approaching the building entrance with orange canopy

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide grey concrete pavement with metal drainage grates and red curb line
tall black cylindrical street lamp with circular concrete base
large white painted text SLOW on the asphalt road surface
orange and white striped building entrance canopy with glass doors

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character steps onto the concrete sidewalk and walks past a tall street lamp. The SLOW road marking is visible on the left as the character approaches a building entrance with an orange canopy, while the neon 10 sign looms closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial walkway with storefronts and digital signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through increasing pedestrian traffic along the storefront-lined sidewalk

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the MARK store entrance

entered.detail: bright yellow illuminated sign with MARK text mounted above the storefront
small vendor booth with yellow and blue paneled exterior on the sidewalk edge
large circular planter containing a palm tree near the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the bustling sidewalk, passing a palm tree planter and approaching a brightly lit MARK store with a yellow sign. The crowd density increases as pedestrians gather near the storefront kiosk, while the towering 10 sign recedes into the background on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit intersection into the dense, commercial bustle of a futuristic city sidewalk. It begins with the character crossing bold yellow stripes at a rain-slicked intersection, passing a stationary yellow sports car beneath the glow of towering corporate facades and digital advertisements. As the character steps onto the concrete sidewalk, the perspective shifts past a tall street lamp and a road marking toward a building entrance shaded by an orange canopy. The scene then expands into a more crowded pedestrian area, moving past a palm tree planter and toward a brightly lit store with a yellow sign. Finally, the camera tracks the character deeper into the urban throng as the towering neon signage of the previous block recedes into the background.
